columns.name: Added
columns.description: The date the vulnerability coverage was added (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD)

columns.name: _BilledSize
columns.description: The record size in bytes

columns.name: Categories
columns.description: Comma-separated list of categories the vulnerability is classified under

columns.name: Cves
columns.description: All CVEs assigned to this vulnerability

columns.name: CvssV2AccessComplexity
columns.description: Enum: L/M/H. CVSS v2 Access Complexity - attack conditions required to exploit

columns.name: CvssV2AccessVector
columns.description: Enum: L/A/N. CVSS v2 Access Vector - how the vulnerability is exploited (Local/Adjacent/Network)

columns.name: CvssV2Authentication
columns.description: Enum: N/S/M. CVSS v2 Authentication - number of authentications required to exploit

columns.name: CvssV2AvailabilityImpact
columns.description: Enum: N/P/C. CVSS v2 Availability Impact - impact to availability

columns.name: CvssV2ConfidentialityImpact
columns.description: Enum: N/P/C. CVSS v2 Confidentiality Impact - impact on confidentiality

columns.name: CvssV2ExploitScore
columns.description: The CVSS v2 exploit score

columns.name: CvssV2ImpactScore
columns.description: The CVSS v2 impact score

columns.name: CvssV2IntegrityImpact
columns.description: Enum: N/P/C. CVSS v2 Integrity Impact - impact to integrity

columns.name: CvssV2Score
columns.description: The CVSS v2 score (0-10)

columns.name: CvssV2Vector
columns.description: The CVSS v2 vector

columns.name: CvssV3AttackComplexity
columns.description: Enum: L/H. CVSS v3 Attack Complexity - conditions beyond attacker control required

columns.name: CvssV3AttackVector
columns.description: Enum: N/A/L/P. CVSS v3 Attack Vector - context of exploitation

columns.name: CvssV3AvailabilityImpact
columns.description: Enum: N/L/H. CVSS v3 Availability Impact - impact to availability

columns.name: CvssV3ConfidentialityImpact
columns.description: Enum: N/L/H. CVSS v3 Confidentiality Impact - impact on confidentiality

columns.name: CvssV3ExploitScore
columns.description: The CVSS v3 exploit score

columns.name: CvssV3ImpactScore
columns.description: The CVSS v3 impact score

columns.name: CvssV3IntegrityImpact
columns.description: Enum: N/L/H. CVSS v3 Integrity Impact - impact to integrity

columns.name: CvssV3PrivilegesRequired
columns.description: Enum: N/L/H. CVSS v3 Privileges Required - level of privileges needed before exploit

columns.name: CvssV3Scope
columns.description: Enum: U/C. CVSS v3 Scope - impact remains in same authority or crosses

columns.name: CvssV3Score
columns.description: The CVSS v3 score (0-10)

columns.name: CvssV3UserInteraction
columns.description: Enum: N/R. CVSS v3 User Interaction - whether user action is required

columns.name: CvssV3Vector
columns.description: The CVSS v3 vector

columns.name: DenialOfService
columns.description: Whether the vulnerability can lead to Denial of Service (DoS)

columns.name: Description
columns.description: A verbose description of the vulnerability

columns.name: Exploits
columns.description: The exploits that can be used to exploit a vulnerability

columns.name: Id
columns.description: The identifier of the vulnerability

columns.name: _IsBillable
columns.description: Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable isfalseingestion isn't billed to your Azure account

columns.name: Links
columns.description: References to security standards this vulnerability is a part of

columns.name: MalwareKits
columns.description: The malware kits that are known to be used to exploit the vulnerability

columns.name: Modified
columns.description: The last date the vulnerability was modified (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD)

columns.name: PciCvssScore
columns.description: The CVSS score adjusted for PCI rules (0-10)

columns.name: PciFail
columns.description: Whether presence on a host would cause a PCI failure

columns.name: PciSeverityScore
columns.description: The severity score adjusted for PCI rules (0-10)

columns.name: PciSpecialNotes
columns.description: Special notes or remarks about the vulnerability pertaining to PCI compliance

columns.name: PciStatus
columns.description: The PCI compliance status

columns.name: Published
columns.description: The date the vulnerability was first published (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD)

columns.name: References
columns.description: Condensed references to security standards: [<source>:<id>,...]

columns.name: RiskScore
columns.description: The risk score of the vulnerability (e.g., Rapid7 Real Risk , 0-1000)

columns.name: Severity
columns.description: The severity of the vulnerability (none, informational, low, moderate, severe, critical)

columns.name: SeverityScore
columns.description: The severity score of the vulnerability (0-10)

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: The type of agent the event was collected by. For example,OpsManagerfor Windows agent, either direct connect or Operations Manager,Linuxfor all Linux agents, orAzurefor Azure Diagnostics

columns.name: TenantId
columns.description: The Log Analytics workspace ID

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The time the event was generated

columns.name: Type
columns.description: The name of the table

columns.name: VulnerabilityTitle
columns.description: The title (summary) of the vulnerability
